payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: Capital Program Committee Meeting book for December 19, 2022, including meeting minutes from November 29, 2022, Bridges and Tunnels project updates, IEC project review of Throgs Neck Bridge Orthotropic Deck Replacement, safety summary, commitments and completions report, Third Quarter 2022 Traffic Light Report, and procurement actions.

payload.description: MTA Independent Engineering Consultant (IEC), provides independent project review
MTA Bridges and Tunnels, operating entity for MTA's toll bridges and tunnels

tool_args.label: Replacement of Upper Level Elevated Approach at VNB – Phase 1

payload.project_name: Replacement of the Upper Level Elevated Approach at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge – Phase 1
payload.status: Completed October 2022, on schedule and under budget
payload.description: Replaced roadway deck on Staten Island approach, westbound Brooklyn approach, and anchorages. Included structural steel retrofits at anchorages and repairs to Belt Parkway ramps. First of several projects in VNB master plan to completely reconstruct nearly 60-year-old approaches.

tool_args.label: Structural Rehabilitation at Robert F. Kennedy Bridge

payload.project_name: Structural Rehabilitation at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge
payload.status: Completed August 2022, on schedule and under budget
payload.description: Steel and concrete repairs and strengthening of structure to meet modern truck loads on virtually all spans of the RFK Bridge while addressing seismic resiliency needs in an integrated fashion.

tool_args.label: Throgs Neck Bridge Orthotropic Deck Replacement (TN49)

payload.project_name: Throgs Neck Bridge Orthotropic Deck Replacement
payload.status: Approximately 92% complete, Substantial Completion forecasted December 2022 (on target)
payload.description: Reconstruct suspended span roadway replacing 1960's concrete grid deck with lightweight steel orthotropic deck, steel repairs, strengthening of stiffening and floor beam trusses, painting of main trusses and floor trusses, replacement of concrete deck at anchorages and towers, new dry fire standpipe from Bronx approach to Queens anchorage, new drainage system, overhead sign gantries, lighting improvements. Contract TN49 awarded November 2018 to Judlau Contracting Inc. with 48-month duration. Deck work in six stages using movable barrier. Bridge returned to full 6-lane configuration September 2022.

tool_args.label: RFK Bridge North Pedestrian Ramp & HRLS Fender Upgrades

payload.project_name: North Pedestrian Ramp & Harlem River Lift Span Fender Upgrades at the RFK Bridge
payload.status: Approximately 30% complete, Substantial completion forecasted December 2023 (on target)
payload.description: Construct new pedestrian ramp from RFK Harlem River lift span north walkway to future East River Greenway, rehab bridge piers, replace main pier fender protection system. Ramp construction complete by summer 2023 to facilitate NYCEDC construction of new greenway.

tool_args.label: Steel & Concrete Rehabilitation of Bronx & Queens Viaducts at TNB

payload.project_name: Steel & Concrete Rehabilitation of the Bronx & Queens Viaducts at the Throgs Neck Bridge
payload.status: Approximately 70% complete, Substantial completion forecasted August 2023 (on target)
payload.description: Steel repairs, concrete pier rehabilitation, and replacement of bearings to address state of good repair and resiliency needs. Almost exclusively staged from under roadway using suspended work platforms to minimize traffic impacts.

tool_args.label: Relocation of Refueling Station and QSB Switchgear at QMT

payload.project_name: Relocation of Refueling Station and Queens Service Building Switchgear at the Queens Midtown Tunnel
payload.status: Approximately 10% complete, Substantial completion forecasted September 2024 (on target)
payload.description: Construction of new outdoor fueling station with electric vehicle charging stations, relocation of switchgear equipment to meet current codes and flood resiliency needs. Addresses employee safety. No impacts on B&T customers.

tool_args.label: Electric Power Resiliency, Utility & Buildings Improvements at Henry Hudson Bridge

payload.project_name: Electric Power Resiliency, Utility, & Buildings Improvements at Henry Hudson Bridge
payload.status: Approximately 12% complete, Substantial completion forecasted April 2024 (on target)
payload.description: Replacement of Dyckman Street substation with higher capacity substation providing full redundancy to Kappock Street substation, replacement of Kappock Street substation equipment, enhanced fire detection and alarm systems, build-out of maintenance garage, utility work at facility administration building.

tool_args.label: Structural Rehabilitation of Cross Bay Bridge

payload.project_name: Structural Rehabilitation of Cross Bay Bridge
payload.status: Recently awarded, project under design. Substantial completion forecasted November 2024 (on target)
payload.description: Strengthen critical components of Cross Bay Bridge (CBB) navigational spans, necessary structural repairs to maintain CBB and Marine Parkway Bridge (MPB), install weigh-in-motion systems on CBB and MPB, replace pedestrian ramp at south end of CBB with ADA compliant shared use path.

tool_args.label: New Randall's Island Ramps and Accessibility Improvements at RFK Bridge

payload.project_name: New Randall's Island Ramps and Accessibility Improvements at the RFK Bridge
payload.status: Forecast award December 2022, Substantial completion forecasted April 2025 (on target)
payload.description: Construct two new vehicular ramps to Randall's Island improving traffic flow and safety. Replace three existing pedestrian ramps with new ADA compliant ramps, improving accessibility from both Bronx and Manhattan to Randall's Island Park.

tool_args.label: VNB-Belt Parkway Connection Improvements

payload.project_name: Improvements to the VNB-Belt Parkway Connection at the VNB
payload.status: Forecast award December 2022, Substantial completion forecasted December 2024 (on target)
payload.description: Improve VNB connection to the Belt Parkway to allow two lanes from the VNB to continue onto the Belt Parkway unimpeded. Widen three existing lanes in westbound direction and improve accessibility at the Bay 8th Street interchange.

tool_args.label: Capital Program Committee Meeting December 2022

payload.description: MTA Capital Program Committee meeting at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY

tool_args.label: Culver Line CBTC Substantial Completion delay

payload.raw_value_text: resolution of previously reported inconsistencies between the ties and track conditions at the Ditmas Interlocking has impacted the project schedule by an additional delay 11 months, which moves Substantial Completion to October 2024

tool_args.label: Queens Boulevard Line West CBTC two-year delay forecast

payload.raw_value_text: Core project forecast to be two years late due to technical issues affecting system stability; contractor expects to meet stability by May 2023
payload.scope: Queens Boulevard Line West CBTC core project

payload.raw_value_text: Substantial Completion dates of the R211A cars were delayed by 17 months

tool_args.label: R211T open gangway prototype cars delay

tool_args.label: New Jamaica Bus Depot Design-Build

payload.description: Design and construction of new LEED certified bus depot at 165-18 Tuskegee Airmen Way, Queens, with phased demolition of existing depot. Designed for 100% electric bus fleet transition. One-story building with 272 Standard Bus Equivalent parking spaces, three bus washing lanes, two interior bus washing stations, one chassis washing station, fifteen maintenance bays, rooftop bus parking, and new three-story administrative building.

tool_args.label: G Line CBTC Design-Build

payload.description: Design, installation, testing and commissioning of wayside CBTC system on NYCT G Line from Court Square station to Church Avenue station. Replaces existing fixed-block, relay-based system. Includes track replacement work and construction of train control rooms. Includes options for 5G DCS, Wi-Fi DCS, CBTC test facility engineering support, and trip stops. Also includes 25-year maintenance contract.

extra_fields.design_builder: Crosstown Partners (TC Electric LLC / Thales Transport and Security)

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: Rockaway Line Resiliency and Rehabilitation

payload.description: Rehabilitation and flood resiliency work along NYCT Rockaway Line in Queens. Includes viaduct repairs at Hammels Wye Campus and along east/west branches, flood mitigation elements, new signal tower, track crossover at Beach 105th Street Station, replacement of South Channel Bridge electrical/mechanical components.

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Phase 1

payload.description: Phase 1 replacement of Metro-North Railroad's Park Avenue Viaduct from north side of East 115th Street to south side of East 123rd Street in Manhattan. Includes replacement of existing structures, tracks, power, communications and signals systems. Options for new raised concrete sidewalks between E. 117th Street and E. 123rd Street and accessible pedestrian signal system.

tool_args.label: ADA Upgrades Package 4 - Four Stations

payload.project_name: Package 4 - ADA Upgrades at Various Stations
payload.description: Installation of eight new elevators, path-of-travel improvements, and associated state of good repair work at four NYCT subway stations: Bay Ridge-95th Street (R Line, Brooklyn), Northern Boulevard (M, R, E Lines, Queens), 137th Street (1 Line, Manhattan), and Parkchester-E. 177th Street (6 Line, Bronx). Includes demolition of existing escalator and installation of new escalator at Parkchester.

tool_args.label: ADA Elevator Package - 19 Elevators Manhattan/Queens

payload.project_name: Elevator Replacements and ADA Improvements at Various Stations
payload.description: Replacement of nineteen elevators and ADA improvements at NYCT subway stations in Manhattan and Queens including: 175th Street (A Line), 14th Street Union Square Complex, 14th Street-8th Avenue (A, C, E, L), 42nd Street-Times Square (N, Q, R, W), 125th Street (A, B, C, D), West 4th Street-Washington Square (A, B, C, D, E, F, M), Jackson Heights-Roosevelt Avenue (E, F, M, R), 74th Street-Broadway (7), Lexington Avenue-53rd Street (E, M).

tool_args.label: Railcar Acceptance and Testing Facility Brooklyn

payload.description: Design and construction of new facility to test and accept rail cars for NYCT in Brooklyn. Facility to include two indoor tracks, each accommodating five railcars at a time, designed to ensure operational efficiency with all features, systems and equipment needed to support railcar receiving and testing operation.

extra_fields.design_builder: JTCM Partners (J-Track LLC, TC Electric LLC, MLJ Contracting Corp.)

tool_args.label: Power Redundancy and Resiliency at BWB & VNB

payload.project_name: Power Redundancy and Resiliency Improvements at Bronx-Whitestone and Verrazzano-Narrows Bridges
payload.description: Replacement of outdated HVAC and sewer systems at BWB and VNB, new electronic power monitoring and lane control systems, electric substation upgrades at VNB, installation of new fiber optic cable and underdeck conduit for FDNY at BWB.

extra_fields.design_builder: Hellman/PJS JV (Hellman Electric LLC, Paul J. Sciarano Inc.)

tool_args.label: MTA 2022 Capital Commitments through November

payload.raw_value_text: Through November the MTA has committed $5.2 billion versus a $5.6 billion year-to-date goal. By year's end the MTA projects committing over 100% of its annual goal

tool_args.label: MTA 2022 Capital Completions through November

payload.raw_value_text: Through November, the MTA has completed nearly $3.8 billion versus a $7.0 billion year-to-date goal. By year's end, the MTA forecasts achieving 69% of its overall $9.2 billion completions goal.

tool_args.label: Systems BU established September 2022 - portfolio overview

payload.claim_text: The Systems BU currently manages 91 active projects with a total value of over $2 billion, and so far in 2022 has awarded 16 projects (with a total value of $212 million) and completed 11 projects (with a total value of $91 million).
payload.description: Update on C&D's Systems Business Unit by Mr. Bienstock, established in September 2022

tool_args.label: Third Quarter 2022 TLR Summary

payload.claim_text: Overall, a total of 464 projects were reviewed this quarter: 55 in Design, 12 in Post-Design to Construction, 397 in Construction. Of these 342 (74%) were designated Green, 43 (9%) were designated Red, 79 (17%) triggered variances in prior quarters. Of the 43 projects that triggered a KPI this quarter, 41 were for Schedule variances, 1 for Cost and 1 was for both Cost and Schedule.
payload.description: Third Quarter 2022 Traffic Light Report summary

tool_args.label: B&T positive TLR performance

payload.claim_text: B&T projects continue to have positive performance results in the TLR, triggering just 4 variances over the last 24 months, which can be attributed to good project planning, proactive management decisions and responsive project teams.
payload.description: Bridges and Tunnels performance in the Traffic Light Report
